codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly replaces hardcoded 'artifactKind: code_patch' with file-extension-based inference. The inferArtifactKindFromTarget helper mirrors server-side logic from issue-execution-packet.ts, handling all required mappings: test files (*.test.*, */__tests__/*), documentation (.md/.mdx/.txt/.rst/.adoc), config (.json/.yaml/.yml/.toml/.ini/.env/.conf), code extensions, and folder-only (multi_file_change). The buildTriadDescription function now calls this helper instead of hardcoding. All 5 expected behavior test cases are covered in the test file.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill file was created at .factory/skills/triad-hardening-worker/SKILL.md as part of this commit, documenting the packet truth work procedure. This is appropriate self-documentation - the skill now captures the inference logic patterns for future similar work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit ed62e649 shows SKILL.md added with 112 lines documenting the triad-hardening-worker procedure

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed proper TDD workflow: read existing test file, added failing tests first, then implemented to make them pass. This aligns with AGENTS.md and the skill's Phase 2 (TDD) procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: 1) Read test file, 2) Ran tests (baseline), 3) Added new tests, 4) Implemented inferArtifactKindFromTarget, 5) Verified all 12 tests pass

summary: Code review PASSED. The artifactKind inference feature is correctly implemented. The inferArtifactKindFromTarget helper accurately mirrors server-side logic, buildTriadDescription uses it properly, and all 5 expected behaviors are tested: code_patch (.ts), doc_update (.md), config_change (.json), test_update (.test.ts), and multi_file_change (folder-only). The worker followed skill procedures correctly, created appropriate documentation, and all 12 tests pass with no type errors.
